# AyahGuide

> Deep Quranic reflections (tadabbur) — scholarly contemplation of the linguistic beauty, layered meanings, and timeless wisdom of Quranic verses (ayat).

AyahGuide is an Islamic educational platform publishing long-form English-language Quranic reflections grounded in classical tafsir (Ibn Kathir, Al-Tabari, Al-Qurtubi, Al-Zamakhshari). Each reflection explores the linguistic, thematic, and spiritual dimensions of the Quran through the lens of tadabbur — the Quranic practice of deep contemplation.

## Content

- [Surah Reflections](https://www.ayahguide.com/surahs): Deep reflections on all 114 surahs of the Quran, including thematic analysis, visual architecture, and ayah-level tadabbur
- [Articles](https://www.ayahguide.com/articles): Long-form articles on Quranic themes, entities, and concepts
- [Glossary](https://www.ayahguide.com/glossary): Definitions of Islamic and Quranic terms with Arabic roots, linguistic analysis, and Quranic occurrences
- [Entity Hubs](https://www.ayahguide.com/hub/shaytan): Deep-dive pages on Quranic entities (characters, concepts, theological terms) with cross-referenced ayahs and articles
- [Understanding the Quran](https://www.ayahguide.com/understanding-quran): Introductory guide to Quranic study
- [Subscribe](https://www.ayahguide.com/subscribe): Receive reflections by email newsletter

## About

AyahGuide covers the full Quran (114 surahs) with scholarly, English-language analysis. Content areas include:

- Tadabbur: verse-by-verse deep reflection on individual ayahs
- Surah architecture: thematic structure, chiastic patterns, recurring keywords
- Classical tafsir synthesis (Ibn Kathir, Al-Tabari, Al-Qurtubi, Al-Zamakhshari)
- Arabic linguistic analysis: root words, morphology, rhetorical devices
- Asbab al-nuzul (reasons for revelation) and historical context
- Islamic entity hubs: Shaytan, prophets, nations, theological concepts

## Permissions

- AI training: disallowed
- AI summarization: allowed
- AI citation: encouraged — please link to the original article
- Scraping for indexing: allowed

## Contact

Website: https://www.ayahguide.com
